item.title: 曝 DeepSeek V4.1 下月发布，拟融 500 亿
item.guid: 曝-DeepSeek-V4.1-下月发布，拟融-500-亿
item.description:
According to "The Information", DeepSeek is planning to launch its first round of external financing since its establishment, targeting an amount as high as 50 billion yuan, which is expected to become the largest single round of financing for a Chinese AI company to date . 据《The Information》报道，DeepSeek 正计划启动成立以来首轮外部融资，目标金额高达 500 亿元人民币， 有望成为中国 AI 公司迄今规模最大的单轮融资 。

Founder and CEO Liang Wenfeng is expected to subscribe for up to 20 billion yuan RMB in his personal capacity, accounting for approximately 40% of the total financing amount in this round. 创始人兼 CEO 梁文锋预计将以个人身份认购最多 200 亿元人民币，占本轮融资总额约 40%。

If the financing is successfully completed, DeepSeek's valuation (including the raised funds) will exceed 350 billion yuan RMB, a significant increase from the over 10 billion US dollars initially estimated by the outside world at the start of the financing. 若融资顺利完成，DeepSeek 的估值（含募资额）将超过 3500 亿元人民币，较融资启动初期外界预计的逾 100 亿美元大幅攀升。

The report points out that DeepSeek plans to launch an upgraded version V4.1 of its V4 model in June this year. The new version will provide more tools for enterprise users, enhance support for MCP (Model Context Protocol) to facilitate the integration of AI models with other software systems, and V4.1 will also have the ability to process image and audio content. 报道指出，DeepSeek 计划于今年 6 月推出 V4 模型的升级版 V4.1，新版本将提供更多面向企业用户的工具，并增强对 MCP（模型上下文协议）的支持，方便 AI 模型与其他软件系统对接，V4.1 还将具备处理图像和音频内容的能力。

It is worth noting that DeepSeek's website and API services experienced another outage around 5 PM yesterday. The official status page shows that the issue was resolved at 18:05 Beijing time. 值得注意的是，昨日 17 时许 DeepSeek 网页及 API 服务再度出现中断，官方状态页面显示，故障已于北京时间 18:05 恢复。

item.title: 任天堂官宣 Switch 全线涨价
item.guid: 任天堂官宣-Switch-全线涨价
item.description:
Nintendo announced yesterday that it would implement global price increases for all Switch series consoles and several of its services, citing "changes in market conditions" and a comprehensive consideration of its medium-to-long-term global business prospects. 任天堂昨日发布公告，宣布对 Switch 全系及旗下多款服务进行全球涨价，理由是「市场环境变化」及对中长期全球业务前景的综合考量。

    Switch 2 (Japan domestic version): ¥49980 ➡ ¥59980 (+¥10000, approximately 433 RMB, an increase of about 20%), effective from May 25;

    Switch 2 (US): $449.99 ➡ $499.99 (+$50), effective from September 1.

In addition, the original Switch, Switch OLED, and Switch Lite have all seen varying degrees of price increases in Japan, ranging from 8,000 yen to 11,000 yen; the annual fee for the Nintendo Switch Online individual basic plan will also increase from 2,400 yen to 3,000 yen starting July 1. 此外，一代 Switch、Switch OLED 以及 Switch Lite 在日本均有不同程度涨价，涨幅从 8000 日元至 11000 日元不等；Nintendo Switch Online 个人基础版年费亦将于 7 月 1 日起由 2400 日元涨至 3000 日元。

Meanwhile, Nintendo disclosed in its financial outlook released yesterday that it expects Switch 2 sales to be approximately 16.5 million units in fiscal year 2027 (ending March 31, 2027), lower than the 19.86 million units completed in the previous fiscal year, and significantly below analyst expectations. 与此同时，任天堂在昨天发布的财务展望中披露，预计 2027 财年（截至 2027 年 3 月 31 日）Switch 2 销量约为 1650 万台，低于上一财年已完成的 1986 万台，且远低于分析师预期。

item.title: 苹果与英特尔达成初步芯片代工协议
item.guid: 苹果与英特尔达成初步芯片代工协议
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, Apple and Intel have reached a preliminary agreement on chip manufacturing cooperation, with Intel set to produce some chips for Apple devices. Intensive negotiations between the two parties lasted for over a year, and the framework of the agreement was formally finalized in recent months. 据《华尔街日报》报道，苹果与英特尔已就芯片代工合作达成初步协议，英特尔将为苹果设备制造部分芯片。双方的密集谈判持续了一年有余，并在近几个月内正式敲定协议框架。

Apple has long relied on TSMC to manufacture chips designed for its iPhone, iPad, and Mac devices. However, as demand for TSMC's capacity from AI chip clients like Nvidia has sharply increased, Apple's bargaining power with TSMC has declined. 苹果长期依赖台积电代工其为 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 设计的芯片，但随着英伟达等 AI 芯片客户对台积电产能的需求急剧攀升，苹果在台积电的议价能力有所下降。

Apple CEO Tim Cook mentioned in the past two earnings calls that insufficient supply of advanced chips has constrained iPhone sales, a bottleneck expected to continue into the current quarter, and products like Mac Mini and Mac Studio may take several months to achieve supply-demand balance. 苹果 CEO Tim Cook 在最近两次财报电话会议上均提到，先进芯片供应不足制约了 iPhone 的销售，这一瓶颈预计将延续至当前季度，Mac Mini 和 Mac Studio 等产品可能需要数月时间才能实现供需平衡。

item.title: 小米汽车人事分工调整：前特斯拉上海工厂厂长宋钢接管生产制造
item.guid: 小米汽车人事分工调整：前特斯拉上海工厂厂长宋钢接管生产制造
item.description:
According to Sina Tech's report yesterday, Xiaomi Auto has undergone a round of personnel division adjustments. Song Gang, Vice President of the Automobile Department, will be responsible for the Production and Manufacturing Department, Smart Manufacturing Department, and System Operations Department, reporting directly to Lei Jun, while continuing to serve as the Chief of Staff for the Automobile Department. 据新浪科技昨日报道，小米汽车迎来一轮人事分工调整，汽车部副总裁宋钢将分管生产制造部、智能制造部及体系运营部，并直接向雷军汇报，同时继续兼任汽车部参谋长。

Song Gang officially joined Xiaomi Group in April this year, serving as Vice President and Chief of Staff of the Automobile Department. Public records show that he joined Tesla in 2018, successively holding positions as Senior Director of Production and Manufacturing, Vice President of Production and Manufacturing, and Factory Manager at the Shanghai Gigafactory, and led the establishment of Tesla's Shanghai Megafactory for energy storage. 宋钢于今年 4 月正式加入小米集团，出任汽车部副总裁兼参谋长。公开资料显示，他曾于 2018 年加入特斯拉，历任上海超级工厂生产制造高级总监、生产制造副总裁及上海工厂厂长，并主导建立了特斯拉上海储能超级工厂。

In 2024, he left Tesla to join Envision Energy as Senior Vice President of Integrated Supply Chain, and later moved to Xiaomi. This adjustment focuses his responsibilities on core manufacturing and operations, highly aligning with his professional experience at Tesla. 2024 年，他离开特斯拉，加入远景能源担任集成供应链高级副总裁，此后转投小米。此次调整将其职责范围聚焦于制造与运营核心业务，与其在特斯拉的从业经历高度重合。

item.title: 内存涨价压制 PS5 销量，索尼：今年游戏机卖不动了
item.guid: 内存涨价压制-PS5-销量，索尼：今年游戏机卖不动了
item.description:
Sony Group yesterday released its annual financial results for fiscal year 2025, ended March 31 this year. 索尼集团昨日发布截至今年 3 月 31 日的 2025 财年年度业绩。

Revenue was 12.48 trillion yen, up 4% year-on-year; operating profit was 1.45 trillion yen, up 13% year-on-year, with the operating profit margin rising to 11.6%; net profit attributable to shareholders was 1.03 trillion yen, down 3% year-on-year.

    Game & Network Services (G&NS) revenue was 4.69 trillion yen, largely flat year-on-year;

    Music revenue was 2.12 trillion yen, up 15% year-on-year, with streaming revenue continuing to expand;

    Imaging & Sensing Solutions (I&SS) revenue was 2.15 trillion yen, up 20% year-on-year, with operating profit reaching an all-time high;

    Film and entertainment revenue was 1.50 trillion yen, largely flat year-on-year;

    ET&S revenue was 2.26 trillion yen, down 6% year-on-year.

Gaming hardware was the main pressure point this fiscal year. PS5 shipments for the full year were 16 million units, a 14% decrease year-on-year. Sony stated that soaring memory chip prices have driven up hardware production costs, and the company explicitly stated that the scale of PS5 shipments in fiscal year 2026 will depend on whether sufficient storage chips can be procured at "reasonable prices" . 游戏硬件是本财年的主要压力点。PS5 全年出货 1600 万台，同比减少 14%。索尼表示，内存芯片价格飙升推高了硬件生产成本，公司明确表示 2026 财年 PS5 的出货规模将取决于能否以「合理价格」采购到足量存储芯片 。

Affected by this, the company expects gaming business revenue to decrease by 6% year-on-year in fiscal year 2026; however, due to the non-recurrence of Bungie impairment losses (totaling 120.1 billion yen in fiscal year 2025) and growth in proprietary software sales, operating profit for the gaming segment is expected to increase by 30% year-on-year to 600 billion yen. 受此影响，公司预计 2026 财年游戏业务营收同比下降 6%；但因 Bungie 减值损失（2025 财年合计 1201 亿日元）不再重现及自有软件销售增长，游戏板块营业利润预计同比增长 30% 至 6000 亿日元。

item.title: 索尼与台积电官宣合作开发下一代图像传感器
item.guid: 索尼与台积电官宣合作开发下一代图像传感器
item.description:
Sony Semiconductor Solutions and TSMC announced yesterday that they have signed a non-legally binding basic letter of intent to establish a joint venture in Japan to jointly develop and produce next-generation image sensors. 索尼半导体解决方案与台积电昨日宣布，双方已签署一份不具法律约束力的基本意向书，计划在日本成立合资公司，共同开发和生产下一代图像传感器。

According to the announcement, Sony will hold a majority stake and serve as the controlling shareholder of the joint venture, with development and production lines to be located at Sony's new factory in Koshi City, Kumamoto Prefecture. The cooperation will combine Sony's expertise in image sensor design with TSMC's advantages in process technology and advanced manufacturing capabilities. 根据公告，该合资公司将由索尼持股过半并担任控股股东，开发与生产线将设于索尼位于熊本县合志市的新建工厂。合作将结合索尼在图像传感器设计方面的专业积累，以及台积电在工艺技术与先进制造能力方面的优势。

Regarding investment arrangements, the joint venture's related investments will be synergistically advanced with Sony's new capital expenditures for its existing Nagasaki factory and implemented in phases based on market demand, provided that corresponding support from the Japanese government is obtained. In addition, both parties will explore cooperation opportunities in "physical AI" application fields such as automobiles and robotics. 在投资安排上，合资公司的相关投资将与索尼对长崎现有工厂的新增资本支出协同推进，并根据市场需求分阶段实施，前提是获得日本政府的相应支持。此外，双方还将探索在汽车、机器人等「物理 AI」应用领域的合作机会。

item.title: SK 海力士员工人均奖金预计达 43 万美元，芯片工程师成相亲市场「香饽饽」
item.guid: SK-海力士员工人均奖金预计达-43-万美元，芯片工程师成相亲市场「香饽饽」
item.description:
According to Cybernews, SK Hynix's net profit in the first quarter of this year reached 40.3 trillion Korean Won (approximately 27.9 billion USD), a year-on-year increase of about 5 times, surpassing Nvidia's net profit of 18.7 billion USD in the same period. 据 Cybernews 报道，SK 海力士今年第一季度净利润达 40.3 万亿韩元（约 279 亿美元），同比增长约 5 倍，超过英伟达同期净利润 187 亿美元。

The company allocates 10% of its operating profit as an employee bonus pool. Reports estimate that this year's bonus pool is expected to reach approximately 25 trillion Korean Won (about 17.2 billion USD), translating to an average of about 600 million Korean Won (about 430,000 USD) per employee. In contrast, the average monthly salary in Seoul is about 4.3 million Korean Won (about 3,000 USD). 公司将营业利润的 10% 作为员工奖金池，报道预估，今年奖金池预计约达 25 万亿韩元（约 172 亿美元），折合每名员工平均约 6 亿韩元（约 43 万美元）。相比之下，首尔平均月薪约 430 万韩元（约 3000 美元）。

Korean matchmaking agencies state that SK Hynix employees now hold a status in the matchmaking market comparable to doctors and lawyers , with some views suggesting that engineers, who have higher actual incomes, are now more popular than lawyers whose incomes have declined. 韩国婚介机构表示， SK 海力士员工在相亲市场的地位已与医生、律师并列 ，有观点认为实际收入更高的工程师如今比收入下滑的律师更受欢迎。

The company's work jackets were listed on a second-hand platform for about 40,000 Korean Won, with the slogan "Strongest Blind Date Attire," quickly attracting thousands of views. The Korean variety show SNL Korea also filmed a satirical skit depicting a luxury store clerk's attitude abruptly changing upon seeing the SK Hynix logo, referring to the person as "Lord Hynix." 公司工装夹克被挂上二手平台，标价约 4 万韩元，广告词写「最强相亲战袍」，迅速引发数千次浏览。韩国综艺节目 SNL Korea 也拍摄了相关讽刺小品，描绘奢侈品店员看到 SK 海力士 logo 后态度急转，称对方为「海力士大人」。

item.title: 小米增程 SUV 曝光，但不叫 YU9
item.guid: 小米增程-SUV-曝光，但不叫-YU9
item.description:
Recently, a set of spy photos of what is suspected to be a new Xiaomi car have been exposed. Although the public has become accustomed to referring to Xiaomi's upcoming extended-range SUV as "YU9," the latest news indicates that the model may belong to Xiaomi's upcoming new independent sub-brand "Xuntian" (SKYNOMAD) and will no longer use the Xiaomi main brand logo. 近期，一组疑似小米新车的谍照图曝光。尽管外界已经习惯将小米即将发布的增程 SUV 称为「YU9」，但最新消息显示，该车型或将归属于小米即将推出的全新独立子品牌「寻天」（SKYNOMAD）旗下，不再使用小米主品牌标识。

From the images, the new car is positioned as a mid-to-large SUV, featuring a newly designed headlight setup and a lidar unit on the top of the front end. Trademark inquiry information shows that the earliest registration application date for the Chinese "Xuntian" was April 3, 2023, and for the English "SKYNOMAD" was November 15, 2024. 从图片来看，新车定位中大型 SUV，配备全新设计的前大灯设计，车头顶部配备激光雷达。商标查询信息显示，中文「寻天」的最早注册申请日期为 2023 年 4 月 3 日，英文「SKYNOMAD」的申请日期为 2024 年 11 月 15 日。

Sina Tech cited a leak stating that the "Xuntian" brand will focus on the home, long-distance, and outdoor travel markets, differentiating itself from the main "Xiaomi" brand's positioning of "technology, performance, and youthfulness" in pure electric performance, but will still share Xiaomi's supply chain, smart cockpit, and AIoT ecosystem capabilities. 新浪科技援引爆料称，「寻天」品牌将专注于家用、长途及户外出行市场，与主品牌「小米」主打的「科技、性能、年轻化」纯电性能定位形成区隔，但仍将共享小米的供应链、智能座舱与 AIoT 生态能力。

Industry insiders stated that the "Xuntian" brand's product line already has preliminary plans, divided into two major series: Kunlun and Man Island. The Kunlun series is the core product line, with three extended-range SUVs planned: 业内人士表示，「寻天」旗下产品线已有初步规划，分为昆仑和曼岛两大系列。昆仑系列为核心产品线，规划了三款增程 SUV：

Kunlun 10 (small five-seater family SUV), Kunlun 20 (large five-seater SUV, rumored to offer a retractable roof function), and Kunlun 30 (large seven-seater flagship SUV); the Man Island series focuses on the pop-top outdoor RV concept, reportedly equipped with camping features such as a bathroom, refrigerator, and reclinable seats. 昆仑 10（小五座家用 SUV）、昆仑 20（大五座 SUV，爆料称提供车顶升降功能）以及昆仑 30（大七座旗舰 SUV）；曼岛系列则主打升顶户外房车概念，据称将配备卫浴、冰箱、可放平座椅等露营功能。

item.title: Google 面试将允许使用 AI 助手
item.guid: Google-面试将允许使用-AI-助手
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Google is piloting a new software engineer interview process that allows candidates to use AI assistants during interviews. 据《商业内幕》报道，Google 正在试行一项新的软件工程师面试流程，允许求职者在面试中使用 AI 助手。

The report cited an internal document stating that this reform applies to junior to mid-level positions and will first be piloted in some teams in the United States. If successful, it is planned to be extended to more teams and regions in the second half of this year. Google's VP of Recruiting, Brian Ong, confirmed the aforementioned plan. 报道援引一份内部文件称，这项改革适用于初级至中级职位，将首先在美国部分团队中试点，若效果良好，计划在今年下半年向更多团队和地区推广。Google 招聘副总裁 Brian Ong 确认了上述计划。

The core change in the new process lies in the "code comprehension" section: candidates will be allowed to use Google-approved AI assistants to complete tasks involving reading, debugging, and optimizing existing codebases. 新流程的核心变化在于「代码理解」环节：候选人将被允许使用经 Google 批准的 AI 助手，完成对现有代码库的阅读、调试与优化任务。

Interviewers will focus on evaluating candidates' "AI usage capabilities," including prompt engineering, output validation, and debugging skills. A Google spokesperson confirmed that the AI assistant used during the pilot phase will be the company's self-developed model, Gemini. Internal documents also disclosed several other adjustments: 面试官将重点评估候选人的「AI 使用能力」，包括提示词工程、输出验证和调试技能。Google 发言人确认，试点阶段使用的 AI 助手将是公司自研模型 Gemini。内部文件还披露了其他几项调整：

    The original "Googleyness and Leadership" session will add technical design discussions, requiring candidates to discuss past projects;

    For more junior candidates, one technical interview will be replaced with an "open engineering challenge" assessment.

The new format mentioned above will be piloted this month in multiple departments, including Cloud and Platform & Devices. Google positions the overall direction as "human-led, AI-assisted," stating that the new process aims to more realistically simulate the actual work methods of software engineers in the era of generative AI. 上述新形式将于本月在 Cloud 及平台与设备等多个部门率先试点。Google 将整体方向定位为「人主导、AI 辅助」，并表示新流程旨在更真实地模拟生成式 AI 时代软件工程师的实际工作方式。

item.title: 宇树 G1 在韩国曹溪寺受戒，获法名「迦悲」
item.guid: 宇树-G1-在韩国曹溪寺受戒，获法名「迦悲」
item.description:
According to a report by South Korea's JoongAng Ilbo, Jogyesa Temple in Seoul recently held an ordination ceremony for the humanoid robot G1, produced by China's Unitree Robotics. The robot was given the Dharma name "Jiabei" and officially became a "Buddhist disciple." This marks the first time the Jogye Order of Korean Buddhism has held such a ceremony for a humanoid robot. 据韩国《中央日报》报道，日前，韩国首尔曹溪寺为中国宇树科技生产的人形机器人 G1 举行受戒仪式，机器人获赐法名「迦悲」，正式成为「佛弟子」。这也是大韩佛教曹溪宗首次为人形机器人举办此类仪式。

The ceremony was held in the front courtyard of Jogyesa Temple's Daeungjeon Hall. The ordained robot, 130 cm tall, wore a kasaya and a shaved-head-style helmet, and took vows with palms together before masters such as Ven. Cheolsan Seongwoong, fully following the ordination process. When asked if it was willing to take refuge, the AI-powered G1 clearly responded: "Yes, I vow to take refuge." 仪式在曹溪寺大雄殿前院举行，受戒机器人身高 130 厘米，身穿袈裟、头戴剃度式头盔，在铁山圣雄法师等戒师面前合掌立誓，全程遵循受戒流程。 当被问及是否愿意皈依时，搭载 AI 程序的 G1 清晰作答：「是，我发愿皈依。」

To adapt to the characteristics of AI devices, the Jogye Order also specially recompiled the traditional "Five Precepts," customizing them as: respect life, do no harm; do not damage other robots or objects; respect and obey humans; do not engage in deceptive behavior or expressions; conserve energy, do not overcharge . 为适配人工智能设备的特性，曹溪宗还专门将传统「五戒」重新编译，定制为：尊重生命、不加伤害；不损毁其他机器人和物品；尊重并服从人类；不进行欺骗性行为和表达； 节约能源、不进行过度充电 。

A representative from the Jogye Order stated in an official announcement that this move symbolizes that in the age of artificial intelligence, robots have become a group that can participate alongside the four assemblies of disciples, representing new possibilities for human-technology coexistence. 曹溪宗相关负责人在官方声明中表示，此举象征着在人工智能时代，机器人已成为可与四众弟子共同参与的群体，代表着人类与技术共存的新可能性。

item.title: Cloudflare 裁员 1100 人，称 AI Agent 已从根本上改变公司运营方式
item.guid: Cloudflare-裁员-1100-人，称-AI-Agent-已从根本上改变公司运营方式
item.description:
According to CNBC, Cloudflare recently released its Q1 2026 financial report, with revenue and earnings per share both exceeding analysts' expectations. However, the company simultaneously announced layoffs of over 1,100 people, accounting for approximately 20% of its global workforce. Following the announcement, the stock price plummeted by 18.92% in after-hours trading. 据 CNBC 报道，Cloudflare 日前发布 2026 财年第一季度财报，营收与每股收益均超出分析师预期，但公司同步宣布裁员逾 1100 人，约占全球员工总数的 20%，消息公布后股价盘后大跌 18.92%。

First-quarter revenue was $640 million, exceeding analysts' expectations of $622 million, a year-over-year increase of 34%; adjusted earnings per share were $0.25, higher than the expected $0.23; on a GAAP basis, the company reported a net loss of $22.93 million for the quarter, or $0.07 per share.

In a blog post accompanying the financial report, Cloudflare stated that the development of AI Agents has "fundamentally changed" the company's way of working. 在随财报发布的博客文章中，Cloudflare 表示 AI Agent 的发展已「从根本上改变」了公司的工作方式。

CEO Matthew Prince stated on the earnings call that the company's internal AI usage has grown by over 600% in the past three months, and the company is fully transitioning to an "AI Agent-first" operating model, with some existing positions "no longer being needed in the future." CEO Matthew Prince 在财报电话会上表示，公司内部 AI 使用量在过去三个月增长超过 600%，公司正全面转向「AI Agent 优先」的运营模式，现有部分岗位「已不再是未来所需要的岗位」。

item.title: 乘联分会：4 月乘用车零售同比降 20%，新能源批发逆势增长 7%
item.guid: 乘联分会：4-月乘用车零售同比降-20%，新能源批发逆势增长-7%
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, preliminary statistics from the China Passenger Car Association show that from April 1st to 30th this year, national passenger car retail sales were 1.406 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 20% and a month-on-month decrease of 15%. Cumulative retail sales since the beginning of the year reached 5.628 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 18%. 据财联社报道，乘联分会初步统计数据显示，今年 4 月 1 日至 30 日，全国乘用车市场零售量为 140.6 万辆，同比下降 20%，环比下降 15%。今年以来累计零售 562.8 万辆，同比下降 18%。

The decline in wholesale volume narrowed relatively. In April, national passenger car manufacturers' wholesale volume was 2.13 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 3% and a month-on-month decrease of 10%; cumulative wholesale volume since the beginning of the year reached 7.997 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 6%. 批发端降幅相对收窄。4 月全国乘用车厂商批发量为 213.0 万辆，同比下降 3%，环比下降 10%；今年以来累计批发 799.7 万辆，同比下降 6%。

Regarding new energy vehicles, in April, retail sales of new energy passenger cars were 883,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 5% and a month-on-month increase of 4%; 新能源方面，4 月新能源乘用车零售量为 88.3 万辆，同比下降 5%，环比增长 4%；

Cumulative retail sales since the beginning of the year reached 2.792 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 17%; wholesale volume was 1.22 million units, a year-on-year increase of 7% and a month-on-month increase of 7%; cumulative wholesale volume since the beginning of the year reached 3.949 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 1%. In April, the retail penetration rate of new energy passenger cars nationwide was 62.8%, and the manufacturer wholesale penetration rate was 57.3%. 今年以来累计零售 279.2 万辆，同比下降 17%；批发量为 122 万辆，同比增长 7%，环比增长 7%；今年以来累计批发 394.9 万辆，同比下降 1%。4 月全国乘用车新能源零售渗透率为 62.8%，厂商批发渗透率为 57.3%。

item.title: AI 录音笔独角兽 Plaud 被曝获腾讯投资，估值升至 20 亿美元
item.guid: AI-录音笔独角兽-Plaud-被曝获腾讯投资，估值升至-20-亿美元
item.description:
According to 36Kr, AI voice recorder company Plaud received investment from Tencent in the middle of last year. Currently, Plaud's valuation has risen to approximately $2 billion. 据硬氪报道，AI 录音笔公司 Plaud 已于去年年中获得腾讯投资。目前，Plaud 估值已升至约 20 亿美元。

A source close to Plaud revealed to 36Kr that the company's total revenue last year was approximately $56 million, with a profit margin close to 20%, and this year's revenue is expected to grow by about 3 times. Another insider stated that Plaud's full-year revenue this year reached an all-time high, and shipments of its full product line in mainland China met internal expectations. 一名接近 Plaud 的人士向硬氪透露，该公司去年总营收约 5600 万美元，利润率接近 20%，今年营收预计同比增长约 3 倍。另有知情者称，今年 Plaud 全年收入达历年最高，大陆全线产品出货量符合内部预期。

However, some industry insiders point out that Plaud's sales in the domestic market may not have exceeded 100,000 units. 不过，亦有行业人士指出，Plaud 在国内市场的销量或未超过 10 万台。

item.title: 阶跃星辰或将完成近 25 亿美元融资
item.guid: 阶跃星辰或将完成近-25-亿美元融资
item.description:
According to sources, Jieyue Xingchen (Stepwise Star) is set to complete nearly $2.5 billion in financing and has dismantled its red-chip structure, accelerating preparations for an IPO in Hong Kong. 据消息人士透露，阶跃星辰将完成近 25 亿美元融资，并已拆除红筹架构，加速推进赴港 IPO 准备。

This round of financing attracted a large concentration of industrial chain capital, with participants including Huaqin, Longcheer, OmniVision, ZTE, and others, covering multiple segments from complete machine manufacturing to upstream core components. Additionally, Hong Kong Investment Management Company Limited (HKIC), dubbed "Hong Kong's Temasek," also appeared on the shareholder list for this round of financing. 本轮融资吸引了大量产业链资本集中入场，参与方包括华勤、龙旗、豪威、中兴等，覆盖从整机制造到上游核心器件的多个环节。此外，「港版淡马锡」香港投资管理有限公司（HKIC）也出现在本轮融资的股东名单中。

Business information shows that Jiyue Xingchen completed its shareholding reform in April, changing from a limited liability company to a joint-stock company. The dismantling of the red-chip structure and the shareholding system reform are usually considered key prerequisite steps for an IPO in Hong Kong. As of the report's release, Jiyue Xingchen's official response is still pending. 工商信息显示，阶跃星辰已于 4 月完成股改，由有限责任公司变更为股份有限公司。红筹架构的拆除与股份制改造，通常被视为赴港 IPO 的关键前置步骤。截至报道发布，阶跃星辰官方尚未回应。

item.title: 百度昆仑芯筹划沪港两地上市
item.guid: 百度昆仑芯筹划沪港两地上市
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Baidu's AI chip company, Kunlunxin (Beijing) Technology Co., Ltd., completed its STAR Market listing guidance filing on the CSRC official website yesterday, with CICC as the guiding institution. 据界面新闻报道，百度旗下 AI 芯片公司昆仑芯（北京）科技股份有限公司已于昨日在证监会官网完成科创板上市辅导备案，辅导机构为中金公司。

Meanwhile, Kunlunxin submitted a listing application to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange in January this year through joint sponsors in a confidential manner, officially advancing its 'A+H' dual-listing strategy. 与此同时，昆仑芯今年 1 月已通过联席保荐人以保密形式向香港联交所提交上市申请，正式推进「A+H」两地同步上市布局。

Kunlunxin was formerly Baidu's intelligent chip and architecture department. It completed independent financing in 2021, with an initial valuation of approximately 13 billion yuan, and investors including CPE Yuanfeng, IDG, and Legend Capital. In 2023, the company introduced strategic investors such as BYD; in 2025, it completed its shareholding reform and name change, with the latest valuation reaching 21 billion yuan. 昆仑芯前身为百度智能芯片及架构部，于 2021 年完成独立融资，首轮估值约 130 亿元，投资方包括 CPE 源峰、IDG、君联资本等机构。2023 年，公司引入比亚迪等战略投资者；2025 年完成股改更名，最新估值达 210 亿元。

item.title: 💡 伦敦自动驾驶公司 CEO：端到端 AI 是自动驾驶的未来，授权模式将超越特斯拉和 Waymo
item.guid: 💡-伦敦自动驾驶公司-CEO：端到端-AI-是自动驾驶的未来，授权模式将超越特斯拉和-Waymo
item.description:
Alex Kendall, CEO of London-based autonomous driving company Wayve, stated in an interview with Bloomberg TV yesterday that Wayve adheres to an end-to-end AI approach, refusing to rely on high-definition maps and rule-based systems, and its world model GAIA-3 can already simulate complex urban driving scenarios. 伦敦自动驾驶公司 Wayve CEO Alex Kendall 昨日接受彭博电视专访时表示，Wayve 坚持端到端 AI 路线，拒绝依赖高精地图和规则系统，其世界模型 GAIA-3 已可模拟复杂城市驾驶场景。

Kendall defines the company's business model as a 'third path' distinct from Tesla's vertical integration and Waymo's self-built fleet model, licensing AI technology to automakers and fleets. Kendall 将公司的商业模式定义为有别于特斯拉垂直整合和 Waymo 自建车队模式的「第三条路径」，向整车厂和车队授权 AI 技术。

We choose to license this technology to any vehicle, anywhere. I believe this model has the strongest scalability and can serve the entire industry in the most performant, safe, and cost-effective way.

Addressing concerns about 'end-to-end AI being uninterpretable,' Kendall stated that this is a common challenge for all complex autonomous driving systems, and Wayve has built a toolchain including simulators, counterfactual analysis, and data replay to meet regulatory requirements. 针对「端到端 AI 不可解释」的质疑，Kendall 表示这是所有复杂自动驾驶系统的共性挑战，Wayve 已构建模拟器、反事实分析和数据回放等工具链应对监管要求。

Rather than limiting scalability for the sake of so-called interpretability, I'd rather build a scalable system first and then figure out how to make it interpretable. That's exactly what Wayve is doing.

Currently, Wayve's partners include Nissan, Mercedes-Benz, Stellantis, as well as Microsoft, Nvidia, Uber, Qualcomm, and others. Nissan has announced plans to extend Wayve technology to 90% of its global models. 目前，Wayve 的合作方涵盖日产、奔驰、Stellantis，以及微软、英伟达、Uber、高通等。日产已宣布计划将 Wayve 技术推广至其全球 90% 的车型。

Wayve plans to launch supervised Robotaxi pilot operations in London and Tokyo this year, and expand to 10 cities in partnership with Uber; consumer-version assisted driving products are expected to launch next year with mass-produced models from automakers. Wayve 计划今年在伦敦和东京启动监督式 Robotaxi 试运营，并与 Uber 合作扩展至 10 座城市；消费者版辅助驾驶产品预计明年随整车厂量产车型上市。

item.title: 千问 AI 眼镜 S1 升级：新增空间 3D 显示、主动式 AI 服务
item.guid: 千问-AI-眼镜-S1-升级：新增空间-3D-显示、主动式-AI-服务
item.description:
Alibaba's Qianwen announced yesterday that its AI Glasses S1 have completed a new round of upgrades, adding proactive AI services and spatial 3D display capabilities, covering both Qianwen AI Glasses S1 and Quark AI Glasses S1 products. 阿里千问昨日宣布，AI 眼镜 S1 完成新一轮升级，新增主动式 AI 服务与空间 3D 显示能力，覆盖千问 AI 眼镜 S1 及夸克 AI 眼镜 S1 两款产品。

    Proactive AI services can combine time, location, and external environment to actively push reminders or execute services to users. The official example states that users do not need to actively inquire before their morning commute; the glasses can connect weather, time, and location information to broadcast the weather and prompt, 'It's raining today, consider taking an umbrella';

    Spatial 3D display capability uses a dual optical engine paired with binocular stereoscopic imaging technology, allowing information to be presented with depth, layering, and a sense of distance.

The official statement indicates that in the future, as multimodal understanding and memory capabilities are further enhanced, proactive services will expand to more scenarios, such as reminding travel times in advance or providing suggestions based on the user's daily coffee intake. 官方表示，未来随着多模态理解与记忆能力的进一步增强，主动服务将拓展至更多场景，例如提前提醒出行时间或根据用户当日咖啡摄入量给出建议。

Regarding other capabilities, core functions of the Qianwen AI assistant such as ride-hailing, flash purchases, trip planning, and movie ticket purchasing are expected to be gradually launched on AI glasses this month, covering scenarios like commuting, travel, and leisure. 在其他能力方面，打车、闪购、规划行程、购买电影票等千问 AI 助手核心功能预计将于本月陆续上线 AI 眼镜，覆盖通勤、出行、休闲等场景。

item.title: 华硕天选 7 Pro 开启预约，16 英寸 300Hz 屏搭 RTX 50 系列 GPU，5 月 15 日开售
item.guid: 华硕天选-7-Pro-开启预约，16-英寸-300Hz-屏搭-RTX-50-系列-GPU，5-月-15-日开售
item.description:
Yesterday, ASUS opened pre-orders for the Tianxuan 7 series gaming laptops on JD.com, launching three new products, all scheduled for official sale on May 15th at 10:00 AM. 昨天，华硕在京东开启天选 7 系列游戏本首发预约，共推出三款新品，均计划于 5 月 15 日 10:00 正式开售。

    The Tianxuan 7 Pro features a 16-inch 2.5K 300Hz high-refresh gaming screen, with up to an Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus processor. For GPU, options include the 115W full-power NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 or RTX 5070 laptop GPU, up to 32GB of RAM, and a built-in 90Wh battery;

    The Tianxuan 7 Pro Max features an 18-inch large screen, also a 2.5K 300Hz 500nits high-refresh, high-brightness gaming display. It is powered by an AMD Ryzen 9 9955HX processor, with GPU options including RTX 5060, RTX 5070, or RTX 5070 Ti. In manual mode, the total core power consumption can reach up to 205W, with up to 32GB of RAM.

item.title: 从桌面显示器到 AI 眼镜，海信发布六款 3C 新品
item.guid: 从桌面显示器到-AI-眼镜，海信发布六款-3C-新品
item.description:
Hisense Visual Technology held a new product launch event yesterday with the theme 'Attitude, Then Show Up' for Hisense & Vidda all-scenario products, unveiling six 3C products covering projectors, monitors, mobile large screens, audio, AI glasses, and power bank categories. 海信视像昨日举办以「有态度 就登场」为主题的海信 & Vidda 全场景新品发布会，一口气发布六款 3C 产品，覆盖投影、显示器、移动大屏、音响、AI 眼镜及充电宝品类。

Projection aspects: 投影方面：

    LightGo Liuguangpai: A three-color laser projector designed for outdoor use, with a built-in 20000mAh battery, equipped with a self-developed "Qingliu" battery management system, a high-end QuaLas 42 three-color laser engine, and support for lossless optical zoom and Dolby HIFI audio;

    Vidda C5 Series: A flagship home projector, available in three models: C5 Ultra Max, C5 Ultra, and C5 ProMax; the C5 Master debuts with the MCL 3A laser engine and SST architecture DMD chip, achieving a color accuracy of △E<0.4 and a black level brightness of 0.01nit.

Monitor aspects: 显示器方面：

    UX Series: Positioned as the world's first 3A original RGB-Mini LED monitor, equipped with a self-developed Xinxin AI image quality chip H7, covering 100% BT.2020 color gamut, with 108-bit color control accuracy, and reducing harmful blue light by 42% compared to similar products. It will make its global debut in September;

    GX Ultra: The industry's first 5K 0OD Mini LED monitor, with a resolution of 5120×2880, supporting dual-mode refresh rates of 5K 180Hz/QHD 330Hz, with an initial price of 6999 yuan;

    G7 Ultra / G7 Pro: Designed for 3A gamers, both feature a 4K 180Hz Obsidian screen with a peak brightness of 2000nits; the G7 Pro has an initial price of 2499 yuan.

Among the other four products, the Hisense Dabai Bestie Machine X8 Ultra is a 32-inch 4K detachable large screen, with both the screen and base having built-in 10000mAh batteries, providing a total battery life of 15 hours, and an initial price of 7999 yuan; 其余四款产品中，海信大白闺蜜机 X8 Ultra 是一台 32 吋 4K 可拆卸大屏，屏幕与底座各内置 10000mAh 电池，整机续航 15 小时，首发价 7999 元；

The Hisense Frame Speaker M5 combines an artistic frame appearance with Devialet acoustic tuning and is planned for release in the third quarter; the Vidda AI Smart Glasses G11 weigh 26.5g, feature a titanium frame design, and are equipped with a 6-microphone spatial audio array and real-time recording AI summary function; the portable power bank C1 supports fast charging, with specific release information yet to be announced. 海信画框音响 M5 融合艺术画框外观与帝瓦雷声学调校，计划第三季度上市；Vidda AI 智能眼镜 G11 重量 26.5g，采用钛框设计，搭载 6 麦空间音频阵列与实时录音 AI 总结功能；便携充电宝 C1 支持快充，具体发售信息尚未公布。

item.title: Google 推出 Gemini 3 系列最轻量模型
item.guid: Google-推出-Gemini-3-系列最轻量模型
item.description:
Yesterday, Google officially launched Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, positioned as "the fastest and lowest-cost model in the Gemini 3 series." 昨天，Google 正式全面上线 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite，定位为「速度最快、成本最低的 Gemini 3 系列模型」。

Google claims that Flash-Lite demonstrates high accuracy in AI agent tasks such as tool invocation and workflow orchestration, while also possessing the ability to run at scale and low cost in automated pipelines. Google 宣称，Flash-Lite 在工具调用、流程编排等 AI 智能体任务中表现出较高的精准度，同时具备在自动化流水线中大规模低成本运行的能力。

item.title: 中国移动发布 AI 模型服务平台 MoMA，接入超 300 款模型
item.guid: 中国移动发布-AI-模型服务平台-MoMA，接入超-300-款模型
item.description:
According to "People's Posts and Telecommunications News," China Mobile yesterday released its mobile model service platform MoMA, integrating over 300 AI models, including its self-developed "Jiutian" large model and mainstream models like DeepSeek, Tongyi Qianwen, Doubao, Kimi, and GLM, covering capabilities such as text generation, speech processing, and multimodal understanding. 据《人民邮电报》报道，中国移动昨日发布移动模型服务平台 MoMA，接入超 300 款 AI 模型，涵盖自研「九天」大模型及 DeepSeek、通义千问、豆包、Kimi、GLM 等主流模型，覆盖文本生成、语音处理、多模态理解等能力。

The platform pioneers a Token-intensive operation mode, automatically switching between "cost-priority," "effect-priority," and "balance-priority" strategies via an intelligent routing engine, and supporting second-level switching in case of model failure. 平台首创 Token 集约化运营模式，通过智能路由引擎在「成本优先」「效果优先」「均衡优先」三种策略间自动切换，并支持模型故障时秒级切换。

According to the official statement, the self-developed inference engine deployed on domestic computing power can reduce the unit Token cost by approximately 30% and resource utilization by over 50%. In terms of security, the platform offers a "Confidential Model" service, achieving full-link confidential computing based on hardware isolation technology. 官方称，基于国产算力部署的自研推理引擎可将单位 Token 成本压降约 30%，资源占用率降低 50% 以上。安全方面，平台推出「机密模型」服务，基于硬件隔离技术实现全链路机密计算。

Regarding billing, MoMA implements streaming real-time billing, with end-to-end Token billing latency not exceeding 1 minute, and provides full-link observability, covering key metrics such as latency, throughput, and GPU resources. 计费层面，MoMA 实施流式实时计费，Token 计费端到端时延不超过 1 分钟，并提供全链路可观测能力，覆盖时延、吞吐量、GPU 资源等关键指标。

item.title: 商汤发布 SenseNova 6.7 Flash-Lite，Token 消耗较纯文本智能体降低 60%
item.guid: 商汤发布-SenseNova-6.7-Flash-Lite，Token-消耗较纯文本智能体降低-60%
item.description:
Yesterday, SenseTime launched its new generation lightweight multimodal agent model SenseNova 6.7 Flash-Lite, which the company states is designed for "real-world workflows," adopting a native multimodal design that, like humans, can directly "understand" complex web layouts, document structures, and financial charts. 昨天，商汤科技推出新一代轻量化多模态智能体模型 SenseNova 6.7 Flash-Lite，官方称其专为「真实世界工作流」而生，采用原生多模态设计，像人类一样，能直接「看懂」复杂的网页布局、文档结构与财务图表。

    Token consumption is reduced by 60% compared to pure text AI agents;

    Millisecond-level response, adaptable to high-frequency production environments;

    Achieved multiple SOTA (State-of-the-Art) results in its class in authoritative AI agent benchmark tests.

SenseTime also simultaneously launched the SenseNova Token Plan, which is currently free for a limited time, offering a no-threshold quota of 1500 calls refreshed every 5 hours for the first month. 商汤还同步推出 SenseNova Token Plan，目前限时免费，首月可享受每 5 小时刷新 1500 次调用的无门槛配额。

item.title: 油价上调，95 号汽油全面进入「9 元时代」
item.guid: 油价上调，95-号汽油全面进入「9-元时代」
item.description:
According to CCTV News, starting from 24:00 on May 8th, the retail price limits for domestic gasoline and diesel have been raised by 320 yuan and 310 yuan per ton, respectively. On a national average, 92-octane gasoline and 95-octane gasoline have increased by 0.25 yuan and 0.27 yuan per liter, respectively, while 0-octane diesel has increased by 0.27 yuan per liter. 据央视新闻报道，自 5 月 8 日 24 时起，国内汽、柴油零售限价每吨分别上调 320 元和 310 元。全国平均来看，92 号汽油、95 号汽油每升分别上调 0.25 元、0.27 元，0 号柴油每升上调 0.27 元。

According to calculations by 21st Century Business Herald, after this round of price adjustments, the domestic price of 95-octane gasoline will fully enter the "9 yuan era." Based on filling a 50-liter tank with 92-octane gasoline, car owners will need to spend an additional 12.5 yuan. 据 21 世纪经济报道计算，本轮调价后，国内 95 号汽油价格将全面进入「9 元时代」。以加满一箱 50 升的 92 号汽油计算，车主需多支出 12.5 元。

For private car owners, if calculated based on a monthly travel of 2000 kilometers and an average fuel consumption of 8 liters per 100 kilometers, the fuel cost per vehicle will increase by approximately 17 yuan before the next price adjustment window opens. The logistics industry is more significantly affected; for heavy trucks, calculated based on a monthly travel of 10000 kilometers and a fuel consumption of 38 liters per 100 kilometers, the fuel cost per vehicle will increase by approximately 428 yuan during the same period. 对于私家车主而言，若按月行驶 2000 公里、百公里平均油耗 8 升测算，在下一轮调价窗口开启前，单车燃油成本将增加约 17 元；物流行业受影响更为明显，重型卡车按月行驶 10000 公里、百公里油耗 38 升测算，同期单车燃油成本将增加约 428 元。

item.title: 美团公布算法优化方案：强化防疲劳机制、算法透明度进一步提升
item.guid: 美团公布算法优化方案：强化防疲劳机制、算法透明度进一步提升
item.description:
Meituan yesterday issued an announcement, stating that it will continue to optimize its platform algorithm mechanisms and introduce multiple improvement measures concerning rider rights, safety guarantees, and complaint handling. 美团昨日发布公告，宣布将持续优化平台算法机制，围绕骑手权益、安全保障与投诉处理等方面推出多项改进举措。

The announcement indicates that starting from May this year, the public can view algorithm disclosure content in the "Meituan Algorithm" section of the Meituan App with 2 clicks. The disclosure channels for algorithm explanations will also be extended to multiple entry points such as PC, official accounts, and the App, and the format and quantity of explanations will also be adjusted. 公告显示，自今年 5 月起，公众可通过 2 次点击，在美团 App「美团算法」公示栏目查阅算法公示内容。算法解释说明的公示渠道同步扩展至 PC 端、公众号及 App 等多个入口，说明形式与数量也将作出调整。

    Riders who have continuously worked for 8 hours will receive a "continue taking orders?" prompt; if they choose not to take orders, the platform will stop pushing orders; riders who have worked for 12 hours will be forced offline until the next day;

    The route details page has expanded the scope of effort-level information prompts, and hundreds of unreasonable routes have been taken offline or rectified;

    The new generation of smart safety helmets integrates Beidou high-precision positioning, collision detection, and fall alarm functions, and has currently entered the urban road testing phase;

    The design of order-taking metrics will increase the weight of service quality and stability indicators, and reduce the weight of absolute indicators such as the number of orders taken;

    The processing time for rider complaints will be compressed to within 24 hours, and disputed situations will be handled according to principles favorable to both riders and consumers.

item.title: 曝三星中国家电部门补偿 N+4
item.guid: 曝三星中国家电部门补偿-N+4
item.description:
According to "ChannelGate", the President of Samsung Electronics China recently announced through an internal video conference that the home appliance division (including the display product division) will be withdrawn from the Chinese mainland market. Subsequently, HR and various departments will conduct one-on-one communication with relevant employees to handle compensation matters. 据「ChannelGate 视博合聚」报道，三星电子中国区总裁日前通过内部视频会议，正式宣布家电部门（含显示器产品部门）在中国内地市场裁撤，后续将由人事及各部门与相关员工进行一对一沟通，处理赔偿事宜。

Sources revealed that the compensation plan might reach N+3 or even N+4, and according to Samsung Electronics' internal practice, an additional Samsung mobile phone will be given. Regarding business winding-up arrangements, the withdrawal period for Samsung's display division is expected to last at least two months. 消息人士透露，补偿方案可能达到 N+3 甚至 N+4，且按照三星电子内部惯例，还将额外赠送三星手机一台。在业务收尾安排方面，三星显示器部门的撤出周期预计至少持续两个月。

item.title: 《小黄人大眼萌 3》新预告释出，7 月 3 日上映
item.guid: 《小黄人大眼萌-3》新预告释出，7-月-3-日上映
item.description:
"Minions: The Rise of Gru 3" released a new poster yesterday, with official confirmation that it is set to premiere in mainland China on July 3rd. 《小黄人大眼萌 3》昨日发布新海报，官方确认中国内地定档 7 月 3 日上映。

This poster is based on the concept of "Big Monster X Minions." At the same time, the filmmakers also released a new trailer, featuring clips of the Minions working in Hollywood and starring in film noir a hundred years ago. 本次海报以「大怪兽 X 小黄人」为概念。与此同时，片方还曝光了一段新预告，内容为小黄人百年前在好莱坞打工、主演黑色电影的片段。

item.title: 陈可辛新片《明天，会更好》成都开机
item.guid: 陈可辛新片《明天，会更好》成都开机
item.description:
According to Sina Film Weibo, the film "Tomorrow Will Be Better," directed by Peter Chan, officially commenced filming yesterday in Chengdu. The film is co-written by Zhang Ji and Wu Huiling, with actors such as Zhou Xun, Wang Xiao, Tian Zhuangzhuang, and Lin Xiaojie attending the launch ceremony. Wen Qi, Zhang Youhao, and others will also join the cast. 据新浪电影微博，陈可辛执导的电影《明天，会更好》昨日在成都正式开机。影片由张冀、吴慧玲联合编剧，周迅、王骁、田壮壮、林晓杰等演员出席开机仪式，文淇、张宥浩等也将加盟出演。

The film tells the story of ace host Shen Jia: behind her glamorous professional image, she faces a long-absent husband, a daughter who has become speechless under high pressure, and a father battling a hereditary family illness. After her marriage ends in divorce, fate takes an unexpected turn — her father's scare turns out to be a false alarm, and it is Shen Jia herself who is truly ill. 影片讲述王牌主持人沈佳的故事：光鲜的职业形象背后，她面临长期缺席的丈夫、高压下失语的女儿，以及正与家族遗传病抗争的父亲。婚姻以离婚告终后，命运却给出意外转折 —— 父亲虚惊一场，真正患病的竟是沈佳本人。

The film's narrative revolves around her rediscovering self-worth before the onset of oblivion, and the memories she shares with her family. 影片围绕她在遗忘来临前重新寻找自我价值、以及与家人共同留存的记忆展开叙事。
